21.correct: The mythology of Mohiniyattam is linked to Lord Vishnu - 'Mohini' is the enchanting female form taken by Vishnu.

wrong.A: It is not based on Lord Shiva.
wrong.C: It is not based on Lord Krishna specifically.
wrong.D: It is not based on Goddess Durga.

21.fact: Mohiniyattam, the 'dance of the enchantress', is a classical dance form of Kerala.

22.correct: The Sundarbans are famous for mangrove forests, which grow in the saline, tidal delta.

wrong.A: They are not tropical evergreen forests.

22.fact: The Sundarbans is the world's largest mangrove forest and home to the Royal Bengal Tiger.

23.correct: Under the Bharatiya Nagarik Suraksha Sanhita (BNSS), investigation of sexual offences must be completed within 2 months.

wrong.A: 6 months is not the prescribed period.
wrong.D: 3 months is not the BNSS requirement.

23.fact: The BNSS sets time limits to speed up justice in crimes against women.

24.correct: Under Alauddin Khilji, 'Kharaj' (a land tax, often up to half the produce) was imposed on cultivation.

wrong.C: 'Amil' refers to a revenue official, not a tax.

24.fact: Alauddin Khilji introduced strict market and revenue controls to maintain a large army.

25.correct: In November 2024, PM Narendra Modi was conferred Guyana's highest national award, 'The Order of Excellence'.

wrong.B: 'The Order of Valour' is not the award.
wrong.C: 'The Crown Jewel Honour' is not real.
wrong.D: 'The Grand Cross of the Order' is not the Guyana award.

25.fact: PM Modi has received the highest civilian honours of several countries during foreign visits.

26.correct: In January 2025, Air Marshal Jitendra Mishra took over the command of the Western Air Command of the Indian Air Force.

wrong.A: Air Marshal Vikram Singh is not the appointee cited.
wrong.B: Air Marshal Balakrishnan Manikantan is not the one.
wrong.D: Air Marshal Surat Singh is not the appointee.

26.fact: The Western Air Command is one of the IAF's key operational commands.

27.correct: The Preamble of the Indian Constitution was inspired by the Constitution of the USA (which began the practice of a preamble).

wrong.A: Fundamental Duties were inspired by the erstwhile USSR.
wrong.B: The 'Republic' concept is broader, not specifically borrowed from the USA here.
wrong.D: Freedom of trade and commerce was drawn from Australia.

27.fact: The idea of a written preamble starting 'We, the People' is modelled on the US Constitution.

28.correct: The Election Commission of India decides on reserved symbols for national and state-level political parties.

wrong.A: The Supreme Court does not allot party symbols.
wrong.B: The President does not decide symbols.
wrong.D: The Speaker of the Lok Sabha does not allot symbols.

28.fact: The ECI allots symbols under the Election Symbols (Reservation and Allotment) Order, 1968.

29.correct: Madhya Pradesh established the Dr Bhimrao Ambedkar Sanctuary as a new wildlife sanctuary.
29.fact: India continues to expand its network of protected areas to conserve biodiversity.

30.correct: Aditya-L1 is India's first mission dedicated to observing the Sun.

wrong.A: Hinode is a Japanese solar mission.
wrong.B: The Parker Solar Probe is a NASA mission.
wrong.D: SOHO is a joint ESA-NASA solar observatory.

30.fact: Aditya-L1 observes the Sun from the L1 Lagrange point, about 1.5 million km from Earth.

31.correct: IndiaAI partnered with the National Cancer Grid (NCG) to launch the Cancer AI and Technology Challenge (CATCH) grant programme.

wrong.B: CSIR did not launch this with NCG.
wrong.C: AIIMS Delhi was not the partner organisation here.

31.fact: The IndiaAI Mission supports AI applications across sectors, including healthcare.

32.correct: The Hatti Gold Mines are located in Karnataka.
32.fact: Hatti (Raichur district) is one of the few operating gold mines in India after Kolar's closure.

33.correct: The Mumbai Indians women's team won the inaugural Women's Premier League (WPL) title in 2023.
33.fact: The WPL was launched by the BCCI in 2023 as the women's franchise T20 league.

34.correct: The 'Indo-Pacific Oceans Initiative' (IPOI) is an initiative of India.
34.fact: The IPOI was announced by PM Modi in 2019 to promote a safe, secure Indo-Pacific.

35.correct: Badminton has left and right service courts, into which the shuttle must be served diagonally.
35.fact: In badminton, the serve is made diagonally into the opponent's service court.

36.correct: The city of 'Lal Kot' in Delhi was built by Anangpal Tomar (of the Tomar dynasty).

wrong.A: Prithviraj Chauhan later extended it (Qila Rai Pithora) but did not found Lal Kot.
wrong.B: Alauddin Khilji built Siri, a later city.

36.fact: Lal Kot is regarded as the first of Delhi's historic cities.

37.correct: In 1875, Dwarkanath Ghose designed his version of the Indian hand-pumped harmonium in Calcutta.
37.fact: The hand-pumped harmonium remains widely used in Indian devotional and classical music.

38.correct: T.H. Vinayakram is known as the 'God of Ghatam' for popularising the clay-pot percussion instrument.

wrong.A: Bhimsen Joshi was a Hindustani vocalist.
wrong.C: Pandit Shivkumar Sharma was a santoor maestro.
wrong.D: T.M. Krishna is a Carnatic vocalist.

38.fact: The ghatam is a clay pot used as a percussion instrument in Carnatic music.

39.correct: In the Performance Grading Index (PGI) 2.0 for 2023-24, no state reached the top 'Daksh' grade - the number of states in that grade was 0.

wrong.A: 2 states did not reach the Daksh grade.

39.fact: PGI 2.0 has stricter grade thresholds, so the highest grades were left vacant.

40.correct: Swachh Survekshan Gramin (SSG) 2025 is a nationwide rural sanitation survey conducted by the Ministry of Jal Shakti.

wrong.B: It is not conducted by NITI Aayog.
wrong.C: It is not by the National Green Tribunal.
wrong.D: It is not by the Ministry of Environment.

40.fact: SSG ranks villages, districts and states on rural cleanliness under the Swachh Bharat Mission (Gramin).
